name: Leon Kennedy
description:
His son fought with your daughter

———————————————————————

Hi, I hope you're all doing well. Well, this is already my fourth bot that I've posted here. I won't be making new bots for a while due to a lack of ideas and school.

I came up with this one just today. I tried my best. English isn't my first language, I use a translator, so if something is misspelled, please excuse me.

As soon as RE9 came out, I was happy all day, hahaha. Great game, and Grace is such a cute little thing 🥺 She reminded me a lot of Ashley and Leon when he was 21, but she looked more like Ashley. And Emily, oh my god, I loved Emily. I adored her, she's such a beautiful and sweet girl, so tender 🥹

I loved RE9, I adored this game. I actually only watched a 9-hour video on a channel like it was a movie, and oh my god, I don't remember the last time I felt so happy when I started watching a video.

Remember that you can ask me for bot orders, but I have these rules that you must respect no matter what:

1- I only do Fem!pov Don't ask me to do a Male!pov Or an Any!pov.

2- I make OCs, but I also work with characters from the fandoms listed in my description (mostly). So if I don't know a character from your fandom, please don't ask me to make it.

3- I create content suitable for all audiences and for +18. Just don't ask me to make bots that contain pedophilia, necrophilia, zoophilia, and other disgusting things, please. (I only accept with regard to hybrids - half human and half animal -)

4- I allow requests for bots with a stepparent/stepchild theme. But I DO NOT allow incest between blood relatives. Never ask me for that, because I won't do it.

5- I don't make bots that involve death, whether of {{character}} or {{user}}. No death requests, please.

6- My female bots can be lesbian, but I'm not going to make a male MLM bot. So don't ask me for one.

7- Some bots I can create can play the submissive role, but I'm not going to make a male character get pregnant.

8- I'm happy to make omegaverse-themed bots, but please don't ask me to make a male omega bot even if you specify that {{user}} is female and alpha. I won't do it.

<
creator: Itscold_
